mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_model_provider ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_model_provider WHERE is_active = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_model_provider (name, base_url, api_key, model, is_active, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKey}, #{model}, #{isActive}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_model_provider SET is_active = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
